title: Building long-running AI agents with ADK
summary: Google Cloud's Agent Development Kit (ADK) is an open source framework for building long-running, stateless, event-driven AI agent systems. It supports a multi-agent pattern where a coordinator agent delegates specialized tasks to sub-agents while maintaining clean reasoning chains.
writeup: This video introduces Google Cloud's Agent Development Kit (ADK), an open source framework for building long-running, stateless, event-driven AI agent systems. It covers the multi-agent pattern where a coordinator agent delegates specialized tasks to sub-agents while keeping reasoning chains clean. The takeaways center on agent orchestration: how event-driven, stateless design supports long-running workloads and how delegation across specialized sub-agents structures the system.
